C

CampbellClass - Class in <Unnamed>
epic utility class (very useful)
convertMetersToCenti(double) - Static method in class CampbellClass
converts double meters to double centimeters
convertMetersToCenti(int) - Static method in class CampbellClass
converts int meters to int centimeters
convertString(boolean) - Static method in class CampbellClass
converts a boolean to a string
convertString(char) - Static method in class CampbellClass
converts a char to a string
convertString(double) - Static method in class CampbellClass
converts a double to a string
convertString(int) - Static method in class CampbellClass
converts an int to a string

R

removeNonAlpha(String) - Static method in class CampbellClass
removes all non alpha characters from a string
removeNonAlpha(String, boolean) - Static method in class CampbellClass
removes all non alpha characters from the string also accepts a boolean input to convert to upper/lowercase
